expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Add a notification center.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Persist notification read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want notification read state stored so it persists across sessions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Read state persists across sessions.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "dependsOn": [],
      "parallelBatch": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Show unread badge and notification list",
      "description": "As a user, I want an unread badge and notification list so I can see new activity.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Unread badges are visible.",
        "A notification list opens.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-001"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Mark notifications read or unread",
      "description": "As a user, I want to update notification read state so I can track what I have seen.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notifications can be marked read or unread.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-001"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Filter notifications by read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state so I can focus on unread items.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notifications can be filtered by read state.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-001",
        "US-003"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Clear all read notifications",
      "description": "As a user, I want to clear read notifications so cleanup stays easy.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "All read notifications can be cleared.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-001",
        "US-003"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}
